## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format .` applied
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (new behavior is covered by tests)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Docs / docstrings updated if the public API changed
